content:
4 FREE AI Tools to be 99.9% More Productive

5 min read
3 hours ago

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Image made with AIMany free tools aren’t very effective, and It’s hard to know which ones are worth it. your time. The result is hours spent switching between apps with little real progress.
That’s why I’m walking you through each tool in the exact order I use them. Let’s get into it. The biggest problem with productivity isn’t the lack of tools.
01). Notebook LM
ScreenshortWhen you create a notebook, you’re building a knowledge base for one specific project.
I’m going to create one right now called Productivity System Build.
1- Click the plus icon and name
2- Now, click add source.
3- Upload everything related to what you’re working on.
4- Click on the studio panel on the right and select audio overview.
5- Click the instruction box and tell it exactly what you want.
I’m adding three articles about workflow optimization, a YouTube video transcript from a productivity expert, and…
